ingredient_lines.note: (you want them to be small - like, golfball size - about 18 potatoes)
ingredient_lines.raw_text: 2 lb. baby red bliss or yukon gold potatoes (you want them to be small – like, golfball size – about 18 potatoes)

ingredient_lines.note: (feel free to substitute with rosemary, basil, garlic, parmesan)
ingredient_lines.raw_text: 1 tsp fresh thyme, chopped (feel free to substitute with rosemary, basil, garlic, parmesan)

ingredient_lines.input_item: the potatoes and place them on a rimmed baking sheet pan
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Wash and scrub the potatoes and place them on a rimmed baking sheet pan

ingredient_lines.note: with 3/4 cup water and cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Fill the pan with 3/4 cup water and cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil

ingredient_lines.note: on the bottom rack for 25-30 minutes or until they are tender
ingredient_lines.preparation: (check by piercing through the foil with a knife)
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Place the potatoes on the bottom rack for 25-30 minutes or until they are tender (check by piercing through the foil with a knife)

ingredient_lines.input_item: Remove the potatoes from the oven
ingredient_lines.preparation: and blot the remaining water with a paper towel
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Remove the potatoes from the oven and blot the remaining water with a paper towel

ingredient_lines.preparation: Allow the potatoes to cool for 10 minutes before coating them with 3 tbsp
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Allow the potatoes to cool for 10 minutes before coating them with 3 tbsp olive oil

ingredient_lines.note: Once the potatoes are coated in oil, (you could also use a fork or even the back of another sheet pan); you want them #1$3″ - #1$2″ thick
ingredient_lines.preparation: smash each one with a potato masher
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Once the potatoes are coated in oil, smash each one with a potato masher (you could also use a fork or even the back of another sheet pan); you want them 1/3″ – 1/2″ thick

ingredient_lines.input_item: Drizzle the smashed potatoes with the remaining
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Drizzle the smashed potatoes with the remaining 3 tbsp olive oil

ingredient_lines.input_item: Sprinkle your herbs on the potatoes and season generously with salt and pepper
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Sprinkle your herbs on the potatoes and season generously with salt and pepper

ingredient_lines.note: the oven on the top rack for 15 minutes and then lower to the bottom rack for an additional 20-25 minutes or until well browned
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Place back in the oven on the top rack for 15 minutes and then lower to the bottom rack for an additional 20-25 minutes or until well browned
